T0184.title: Spouse Lookup
T0184.definition: In illicit data trading, “po” stands for spouse. “API po” refers to obtaining a target’s spouse information by exploiting API vulnerabilities; “database po” refers to querying spouse data from social engineering databases.
T0184.description: In illicit data trading, the term “po” is shorthand for spouse. “API po” describes the method of acquiring a target’s marital partner information through exploiting security flaws in application programming interfaces. “Database po” refers to retrieving spouse-related data from a social engineering or doxing database.
T0184.usageExample: “Nationwide text-based spouse records with divorce/marriage status, includes both parties’ frequently used numbers, with dates, instant delivery.”
